tasks.label: 🚀 Deploy to Homebridge
tasks.command: npm run build && rsync -av --delete dist/ homebridge-ui/ config.schema.json package.json icon.png pinky@thebrain.digital-flux.com:/opt/stacks/volumes/homebridge/node_modules/homebridge-envisalink-uno/ && ssh pinky@thebrain.digital-flux.com 'docker exec homebridge kill -SIGUSR2 $(docker exec homebridge cat /homebridge/homebridge.pid 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null || true'

tasks.label: 🚀 Deploy + Restart Homebridge
tasks.command: npm run build && rsync -av --delete dist/ homebridge-ui/ config.schema.json package.json icon.png pinky@thebrain.digital-flux.com:/opt/stacks/volumes/homebridge/node_modules/homebridge-envisalink-uno/ && ssh pinky@thebrain.digital-flux.com 'docker restart homebridge'

tasks.label: 📋 View Homebridge Logs
tasks.command: ssh pinky@thebrain.digital-flux.com 'docker logs homebridge --follow --since 0m 2>&1 | grep -i envisalink'
